allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/players.json'\); console.log\('Records:', d.length\); console.log\('First:', d[0]\); console.log\('Keys:', Object.keys\(d[0]\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./data/players.json'\); console.log\('Total players:', p.length\); console.log\('With AUM:', p.filter\(x => x.aum_numeric > 0\).length\); console.log\('From deals \(N/A\):', p.filter\(x => x.aum_display === 'N/A'\).length\); console.log\('First 5:', p.slice\(0,5\).map\(x => x.name\)\); console.log\('Last 5:', p.slice\(-5\).map\(x => x.name\)\);")
